race.comment: BELLEISTIC KIDS (1) has raced handy and boxed on well for a couple of minor placings of late in mile races. Won't mind this step up in distance and despite shouldering 61kgs his class will take him a long way. Evergreen mare MISS STALWART (9) took over a long way from home and kept giving to win a BM74 over 1600m at Goulburn recently. Open company is a different kettle of fish but she hasn't put in a bad run for quite a while. Good each-way hope. SAMURAI (10) was easily accounted for by MISS STALWART last start but will enjoy this slightly longer journey. KINGSTON CHARM (3) hasn't won for a long while but her last couple of efforts in Highways have been encouraging.
